steps.t: There must be a source of fresh water somewhere in the Orc-mines. Edhere has asked you to find a source of fresh water for the miners who are dying of…
The exhausted miners can be found in the Orc-mines. You should bring the fresh water to the exhausted miners as Edhere requested.
Edhere is in the Orc-mines. You should return to Edhere and let him know that you have found fresh water.
